title: viburnum sieboldii subsp. obovatifolium
intro: Viburnum sieboldii subsp. obovatifolium, also known as the Siebold's viburnum or Korean spicebush, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae, native to East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Viburnum sieboldii subsp. obovatifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and berries, and can be found in various forms such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
